libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime on JDK 25/current-defaults, ensure the generated test build applies runtime system properties for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests should prefer an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 instead of external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient APIs reference optional Vert.x auth modules; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless intentionally adding the optional auth dependency.
Multipart/file upload coverage can trigger the Netty unsafe-access path in native runs if the JDK 25 runtime properties are not applied.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra test dependencies or Docker services are required for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage: the artifact brings Vert.x Core/Netty transitively and can be exercised against an in-process loopback HTTP server. However, version 5.0.1 still uses Netty 4.2.x, and the existing 5.0.0 test scaffold already documents the same Java 25 native-run unsafe-access requirement.
